title: Settings
description: Manage your account settings, preferences, and API access.
appearanceDescriptionDesktop: Change how your dashboard looks and feels in your browser.
appearanceDescriptionMobile: How your dashboard looks in your browser.
brandColorDescription: Update your dashboard to your brand color.
displayPreferenceDescription: Switch between light and dark modes.
profileDescription: Manage your personal information and how others see you.
preferencesDescription: Customize your regional and display settings.
notificationsDescription: Choose what you want to be notified about and how often.
dailyRankingReportsHint: Receive a daily summary of your keyword ranking changes.
positionAlertsHint: Get alerted when keywords move significantly in search results.
keywordOpportunitiesHint: Be notified about new keyword ranking opportunities.
teamInvitationsHint: Receive notifications when you are invited to a team.
systemUpdatesHint: Stay informed about platform updates and maintenance.
apiKeysDescription: Manage API keys for programmatic access to your data.
apiKeyGeneratedBanner: Your new API key has been generated. Copy it now as it will not be shown again.
noApiKeys: No API keys yet. Generate your first key above.
apiKeyNameRequired: Please enter a name for the API key
apiKeyScopeRequired: Please select at least one scope
